content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: File

Date: November 15, 1978

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
Ted Prim

Subject: Government Code Section 87202(b) - newly elected state officers

Newly elected state officers must file a Statement of Economic Interests on Form 721, covering the period from the date of their declaration of candidacy through December 31. This Statement is due on the regular annual filing date, which is no later than March 1.
